bitrova.description: Feature-rich task management app with Supabase authentication & cloud sync. Includes recurring tasks, glassmorphism design, attachments, subtasks, drag & drop, undo/redo and Lottie animations. Cross-platform iOS/Android/Web.

bass_academy.description: Interactive music training application built with React 19 and Web Audio API. Features real-time audio synthesis, dynamic exercise generation, and responsive tablature visualization.

mp_pantuflones.description: Headless E-commerce solution with secure Stripe/MercadoPago integration, dynamic inventory management via MongoDB, and SSR performance optimizations.

dumu.description: Full-stack AI app that extracts bass lines from any audio file using Meta AI's Demucs neural network for source separation and Spotify's Basic Pitch for audio-to-MIDI conversion. Features BPM detection, real-time progress pipeline, drag & drop upload, and one-click MIDI download.

soul_solutions.description: Professional landing page for mainframe modernization consulting. Demonstrates legacy migration expertise and system design capabilities.

forma_real.description: Fitness community forum with custom WordPress architecture. OOP plugin with custom MySQL tables, real-time notifications, moderation system, full-text search, and modern UI with micro-animations.
